creator: boian.petrov@gmail.com
text:
I can not compile (neither install via pkg_add) the "ark" port.I am with kde 3.5, custom kernel, zfs root.
This is what happens when I try to make it:

[root@HARDUNIX /usr/ports/archivers/ark]# make install clean
===>   ark-4.9.5 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/moc-qt4 - found
===>   ark-4.9.5 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4 - found
